title: toxicoscordion venenosum var. venenosum
intro: Toxicoscordion venenosum var. venenosum, also known as poison camas, is a plant species belonging to the lily family and native to the western regions of North America. Traditionally, poison camas has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and calm respiratory problems. Poison camas is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to its potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
